name: ROGERS CORP
business: Rogers Corporation designs, develops, manufactures and sells high-performance and high-reliability engineered materials and components. It operates two strategic operating segments: Advanced Electronics Solutions (AES) and Elastomeric Material Solutions (EMS). Products are sold globally to fabricators, distributors, converters, and original equipment manufacturers (OEMs).

exposures.sentence: Our AES operating segment designs, develops, manufactures and sells circuit materials, ceramic substrate materials, busbars and cooling solutions for applications in EV/HEV, automotive (e.g., ADAS), aerospace and defense (e.g., antenna systems, communication systems and phased array radar systems), renewable energy (e.g., wind and solar), wireless infrastructure (e.g., power amplifiers, antennas and small cells), mass transit, industrial (e.g., variable frequency drives), connected devices (e.g., mobile internet devices and thermal solutions) and wired infrastructure (e.g., computing and internet protocol infrastructure) markets.
